pi_items.source: Confirmed via task description in task.json which explicitly instructs setting the payer to 'Walk-in Customer'.
Confirmed via task description in task.json which explicitly instructs adding a line item for 'Chai'.
Confirmed via task description in task.json which explicitly instructs setting the quantity to 12.
Confirmed via task description and setup_data.sh, which programmatically creates a bank account named 'Cash on Hand'.
Confirmed via task description and setup_data.sh, which programmatically creates a business named 'Northwind Traders'.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a cash receipt in Manager.io for the synthetic business 'Northwind Traders' (created by setup scripts). The target bank account is 'Cash on Hand' (also provisioned by setup scripts). The user must record a sale for the payer 'Walk-in Customer' containing the item 'Chai' with a quantity of 12. All these parameters are explicitly defined in the task instructions and supported by the environment setup scripts.
